utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe ! Come on ! Let go ! Come on ! Why are not you dressed yet ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry , but I just wrote the best dance song for your wedding . Check this out .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I just wrote the best dance song for your wedding . Check this out .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , Phoebe , I will tell you what , if you get ready now I will let you play it at the wedding .

emotion_cause.span: 3_if you get ready now I will let you play it at the wedding .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh but Mon , if you touch my guitar again I will have to pound on you for a little bit .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Fair enough , now go get ready !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will get everybody else , finally we can start celebrating my ... I am sorry , uh apparently I have opened the door to the past .
